current_result: S4 reviewed 45 reverse-flow/exchange diagnostic rows and marks current upcomer and matched-plane evidence as recirculation-guard evidence.
allowed_thesis_claim: RAF/RMF/SVF diagnostics justify disabling ordinary single-stream closure labels in materially recirculating sections.
forbidden_claim: Do not claim an admitted exchange-cell coefficient, ordinary upcomer Nu/f_D/K, or final predictive score from these rows.
claim_boundary: Diagnostic evidence may motivate architecture, attribution, and guardrails; it is not an admitted coefficient or final predictive score.

current_result: Phase 2 and upcomer preflight preserve residual rows as diagnostic attribution evidence with missing exchange/source fields.

forbidden_claim: Do not absorb residuals into internal Nu, exchange coefficients, or realized wallHeatFlux runtime inputs.
claim_boundary: Diagnostic evidence may motivate architecture, attribution, and guardrails; it is not an admitted coefficient or final predictive score.
